description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Build: cross that runs every Saturday at 16:00 and can be manually triggered. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to cross-build for windows and macosx in both debug and release modes. It checks out the repository, pulls a specific Docker image, sets up a ccache directory, and uses the ccache action to cache the directory. Then it runs a cross-building script in a Docker container with the specified target platform, mode, and workspace.
